title: natscontext svcbackend protocol v1
description: Wire envelopes for the natscontext svcbackend request/reply protocol. Each type corresponds one-to-one with a Go struct in wire.go. Sealed payloads (LoadSealed, SaveSealed) never appear on the wire at the top level; they describe the plaintext carried inside the base64-encoded sealed string of their outer envelope. Successful responses always omit the error field; it is never serialized as JSON null. Wire types are published only under $defs and the document carries no top-level $ref; consumers either validate directly against #/$defs/<TypeName> or use the per-endpoint standalone documents synthesized at runtime by EndpointSchemaV1.

Error.description: Wire-level error carried inside the error field of every response envelope. Successful responses omit error entirely.

code.description: Wire-level error code. stale_key is a rotation retry signal returned when the server fails to Open a sealed request because the client sealed to a prior long-term xkey; conformant clients invalidate, refetch sys.xkey, and retry once.

message.description: Human-readable description. MUST NOT contain payload bytes.

SysXKeyRequest.description: Empty request envelope used to fetch the server's long-term xkey public key.

SysXKeyResponse.description: Advertises the server's long-term xkey public key; clients cache it for sealing subsequent requests.

xkey_pub.description: Encoded curve (X) public key of the server's long-term xkey.

LoadRequest.description: Plaintext request to fetch a stored context payload.

reply_pub.description: Client-generated per-request ephemeral xkey public key. The server seals LoadSealed to this key.

LoadResponse.description: Response carrying a sealed context payload, or an error.

sealed.description: Base64 encoding of the xkv1 ciphertext whose plaintext is a LoadSealed JSON document.

LoadSealed.description: Plaintext document carried inside LoadResponse.sealed; never sent in the clear.

req_id.description: Echo of the req_id from the matching LoadRequest.

SaveRequest.description: Request carrying a sealed context payload to be stored.

sender_pub.description: Client's ephemeral xkey public key. The server uses it to open sealed.

sealed.description: Base64 encoding of the xkv1 ciphertext whose plaintext is a SaveSealed JSON document.

SaveResponse.description: Acknowledgment of a save attempt; carries an error on failure and is otherwise empty.

SaveSealed.description: Plaintext document carried inside SaveRequest.sealed; never sent in the clear.

data.description: Raw context payload bytes to store.

req_id.description: Correlation token; servers MAY use it to dedupe replays.

DeleteRequest.description: Request to remove a stored context.

req_id.description: Correlation token; servers MAY use it to dedupe replays.

DeleteResponse.description: Acknowledgment of a delete attempt. Deleting a missing name succeeds with no error.

ListRequest.description: Empty request envelope; returns all stored context names.

ListResponse.description: Sorted list of stored context names, or an error.

names.description: Stored context names in ascending lexicographic byte order.
